mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_hazop t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_hazop WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_hazop t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_hazop WHERE hazop_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_hazop (hazop_no, node_name, pid_drawing_no, review_date, design_intent, team_leader, secretary, status, created_by, modified_by, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{hazopNo}, #{nodeName}, #{pidDrawingNo}, #{reviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{designIntent}, #{teamLeader}, #{secretary}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'IN_PROGRESS'), #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_hazop SET node_name = #{nodeName}, pid_drawing_no = #{pidDrawingNo}, review_date = #{reviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, design_intent = #{designIntent}, team_leader = #{teamLeader}, secretary = #{secretary}, status = #{status}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_hazop SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_psm_hazop_item WHERE hazop_id = #{hazopId} ORDER BY sort_order, item_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_hazop_item (hazop_id, item_no, deviation, guide_word, cause, consequence, likelihood, severity, risk_grade, safeguard, owner, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{hazopId}, #{itemNo}, #{deviation}, #{guideWord}, #{cause}, #{consequence}, #{likelihood}, #{severity}, #{riskGrade}, #{safeguard}, #{owner}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE())
